title: Spicy Smoked Mediterranean Chicken Pilaf
description: A spicy and flavorful dish featuring chicken, rice, and Mediterranean spices, cooked to perfection in a tandoor clay pot with a hint of rice wine and cure.
instructions: Preheat the tandoor clay pot to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Mix together the smoked paprika, ground cumin, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper in a small bowl.
Add the olive oil to the preheated tandoor clay pot and swirl it around to coat the bottom.
Add the chicken to the tandoor clay pot and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the uncooked white rice to the tandoor clay pot and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the rice wine, chicken broth, and spice mixture to the tandoor clay pot and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
